rule_text: Class-I and Special Class (Civil) AP contractor registration must be approved by the Board of Chief Engineers; the Chairman BoCE issues the registration order specifying the upper monetary tendering limit.
source_clause: GO Ms No 94/2003 Annexure-VI (Form of Registration Order)
verification_method: Check Class-I/Special-Class registration order is signed by BoCE Chairman with monetary-limit specified

rule_text: Changes in partnership of an AP-registered Contractor firm must be intimated to the registering authority within ONE MONTH of the change AND fresh Solvency Certificate must be produced in the name of substituting partners; failure to notify within one month → automatic forfeiture of registration AND debarment from tendering.
source_clause: GO Ms No 94/2003 Annexure-VI (Form of Registration Order)
verification_method: Check partnership-change record on file matches dates within 1 month; verify fresh solvency certificate at partner-substitution

rule_text: Renewal of AP contractor registration must be applied for at least ONE MONTH before expiry of the 5-year validity period.
source_clause: GO Ms No 94/2003 Annexure-VI (Form of Registration Order)
verification_method: Check renewal application date <= (registration_expiry - 30 days); reject late-renewal-restored registrations bidding mid-gap

rule_text: AP-registered contractors who fail to furnish a valid Income Tax Clearance Certificate when required may be removed from the approved contractor list — formal removal letter is issued and Security Deposit released.
source_clause: GO Ms No 94/2003 Annexure-VII(b) (Removal Form Case ii)
verification_method: Check bidder has not been removed from approved list for ITC failure; cross-reference COT website
